item.title: Has TVS Holdings Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, TVS Holdings Ltd has declared a dividend of 1720% (₹93 per share) with an ex-date of April 2, 2026. The company has shown strong total returns across various periods, with a 5-year total return of 376.93%. Time: Mar 27 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd has declared a 6% dividend, with an ex-date of April 2, 2026. However, total returns over various periods have been negative, indicating poor price performance despite the dividend announcement. Time: Mar 27 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: What is the bonus history of Triton Valves?
item.description: Triton Valves has issued a 3:1 bonus most recently, with an ex-date of March 30, 2026, and a record date of April 1, 2026. Previously, the company issued a 2:1 bonus on July 6, 2010. Time: Mar 27 2026 11:00 PM IST

item.title: Pricol Ltd Joins Mojo Stocks List Following Strong Q3 Financials
item.description: Pricol Ltd, a small-cap player in the auto components and equipment sector, has been added to the prestigious Mojo Stocks list as of 27 March 2026. This inclusion reflects the company’s robust financial performance, improving momentum, and alignment with long-term investment strategies focused on quality and growth. Time: Mar 27 2026 08:50 PM IST

item.title: NIIT Learning Systems Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: NIIT Learning Systems Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Fusion Finance Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Fusion Finance Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend and long-term weakness in the stock’s price momentum. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: CSB Bank Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: CSB Bank Ltd, a small-cap player in the private sector banking industry, has recently formed a Death Cross—a technical pattern where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average—indicating a potential shift towards a bearish trend and signalling long-term weakness in the stock’s price momentum. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Prataap Snacks Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Prataap Snacks Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: PVP Ventures Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: PVP Ventures Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Realty sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This technical development, coupled with deteriorating momentum indicators and a downgrade in its Mojo Grade to Strong Sell, raises concerns about the stock’s near- and long-term outlook. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Ovobel Foods Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Ovobel Foods Ltd, a micro-cap player in the FMCG sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term outlook. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Orient Ceratech Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Orient Ceratech Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Electrodes & Refractories sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA. This technical development often signals a shift towards a bearish trend, raising concerns about the stock’s near-term momentum and long-term strength. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Honasa Consumer Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Honasa Consumer Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, signalling a golden cross on 27 Mar 2026. While this technical event often suggests a shift towards bullish momentum, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a nuanced picture that merits closer examination. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: SKM Egg Products Export Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: SKM Egg Products Export (India) Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, raising concerns about the stock's near-term momentum and long-term strength within the FMCG sector. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Antelopus Selan Energy Ltd — On a Day the Stock Rose 2.58%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Antelopus Selan Energy Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 27 Mar 2026. Yet, the broader technical and fundamental picture presents a nuanced view that tempers the enthusiasm this crossover might otherwise inspire. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Parnax Lab Ltd — On a Day the Stock Fell 2.92%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Parnax Lab Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 27 Mar 2026. However, the stock declined 2.92% on the same day, while monthly momentum indicators remain mildly bearish. This juxtaposition of signals calls for a detailed examination of the technical and fundamental context to assess the reliability of the crossover. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Sportking India Ltd — On a Day the Stock Fell 3.38%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Sportking India Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 27 Mar 2026. Yet, the stock declined 3.38% on the same day, while monthly technical indicators remain mildly bearish. This divergence between the moving averages and price action calls for a detailed examination of the signal’s reliability. Time: Mar 27 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Ganesha Ecosphere Ltd Surges 7.4% to Day's High of Rs 840 — Outperforms Sector by 9.84 Percentage Points
item.description: In a session marked by broad market weakness, Ganesha Ecosphere Ltd defied the trend with a robust 7.4% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 840. This outperformance of nearly 10 percentage points over the Textile sector's 2.51% decline highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally on 27 Mar 2026. Time: Mar 27 2026 04:55 PM IST
